basic_details.job_title: IMD Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Administrative and Scientific Consultants Posts
basic_details.short_information: India Meteorological Department (IMD) Administrative and Scientific Consultants Notification 2026 has been released on 13 June 2026 on the official website of IMD. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced through the IMD Administrative and Scientific Consultants Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 63 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Retired Central Government officers at Level-11 or equivalent for Administrative Consultant, Retired Central Government officers from scientific/technical cadres at Level-08 or above for Scientific Consultant, At least 2 years relevant work experience prior to retirement, Fair knowledge of computer applications, Good communication and interpersonal skills
qualification.details: Administrative Consultant: Retired Central Government officers retired at the level of Under Secretary/ Section Officer or equivalent (Level - 11). At least 2 years relevant work experience prior to retirement. Fair knowledge of computer applications. Good communication and interpersonal skills. Scientific Consultant: Retired Central Government officers from scientific/technical cadres, who retired in Level-08 or above. At least 2 years relevant work experience prior to retirement. Fair knowledge of computer applications. Good communication and interpersonal skills.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IMD to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.india_meteorological_department_imd: Retired Central Government officers at Level-11 or equivalent for Administrative Consultant, Retired Central Government officers from scientific/technical cadres at Level-08 or above for Scientific Consultant, At least 2 years relevant work experience prior to retirement, Fair knowledge of computer applications, Good communication and interpersonal skills

content_sections.heading: IMD Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IMD Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IMD Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IMD Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Administrative Consultant: Retired Central Government officers retired at the level of Under Secretary/ Section Officer or equivalent (Level - 11). At least 2 years relevant work experience prior to retirement. Fair knowledge of computer applications. Good communication and interpersonal skills. Scientific Consultant: Retired Central Government officers from scientific/technical cadres, who retired in Level-08 or above. At least 2 years relevant work experience prior to retirement. Fair knowledge of computer applications. Good communication and interpersonal skills.

content_sections.heading: IMD Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 63 years for all posts.

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IMD to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IMD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the IMD Administrative and Scientific Consultants posts is 07 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for IMD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies for Administrative and Scientific Consultants posts in the India Meteorological Department.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for Administrative Consultant?
faq.answer: Retired Central Government officers retired at the level of Under Secretary/ Section Officer or equivalent (Level - 11) are eligible for the Administrative Consultant post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for Scientific Consultant?
faq.answer: Retired Central Government officers from scientific/technical cadres, who retired in Level-08 or above, are eligible for the Scientific Consultant post.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for IMD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the IMD Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all consultant posts is 63 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for IMD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Application Screening and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the IMD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official IMD website or the direct link provided in the Important Links section before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these IMD posts?
faq.answer: The job type for these posts is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for IMD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.
